recentTweets.text: In the last week ICE agents have shot & killed two people—following the same violent pattern as the murders of Renee Good & Alex Pretti. After this latest wave of brutality, @RepRobertGarcia & I are demanding info about how DHS’s policies may have led to these tragic killings. https://t.co/oewOo36sto
RT @OutFrontCNN: Senator Blumenthal says he believes Blanche’s nomination to become Attorney General is “in real danger” as two GOP senator…

The President’s social media posts—covering war & peace & government regulations—move markets. Truth Social selling preferential access is yet another example of flagrant corruption, trading access to the White House for Trump’s self-enrichment. https://t.co/rdZpUH3ZxA

It is clear Republicans do not have the support they need to pass the Take Care of America’s Veterans Act because of their unacceptable & unconscionable proposal to cut benefits for millions of disabled veterans. https://t.co/koqDliRM8n
There are other viable ways to pay for this legislation, & Republican leaders must now come to the table to engage in meaningful bipartisan discussions about the path forward.
On @weeknightmsnow, I discussed AG nominee Todd Blanche seriously considering using federal agents at the polls to intimidate people & suppress the vote. https://t.co/EAXEexVUMk

Funding the Major Richard Star Act cannot come at the cost of other veterans’ earned benefits—as Republicans are proposing. Veterans are speaking out about the importance of passing the Major Richard Star Act without depriving fellow veterans of their disability benefits. https://t.co/tuFq73mMMs

Blanche ducked & dodged when I questioned him about killing an investigation into the possible pay-to-play commutation of David Gentile. The US Attorney General must put justice first, not serve as Trump’s mob consigliere. https://t.co/OFLSXc4nyN

The Trump admin is reportedly in cahoots with the Iranian gov't to send asylum seekers back to face likely torture, imprisonment, & possibly death. Blanche denied this policy & made clear he will turn a blind eye to anything politically inconvenient for the President. https://t.co/Y2JBkuzko2

Our Russia Sanctions Bill is the product of lengthy & difficult bipartisan work, & now has broad support in the Senate & from the White House. As Ukraine turns the tide on the battlefield, our bill would be hugely impactful in stopping Russia’s murderous slaughter. https://t.co/4GJdLLNQs5

HAPPENING NOW: Before his death Sen. Graham secured White House agreement on our bill to bring sanctions against purchasers of Russian oil. I’m proud to announce the new text & lead a bipartisan group of senators to hold Russia’s war enablers accountable. https://t.co/yAqkWJApqc

Exciting to join LEAP’s Read on the Green in New Haven. Books open doors to new ideas. Wonderful to see so many kids enjoying reading & learning more about the world & each other. https://t.co/ygkbd33lAC
Right now, he’s simply Trump’s mob consigliere. Republicans will have him around their necks.

Blanche has blown any serious claim to confirmation by failing to renounce his role as Trump’s personal legal henchman—& rescind cravenly illegal schemes like Trump tax immunity & abusive press subpoenas. https://t.co/ByudV2wK58

I remember serving on a panel with him at the Munich Security Conference and he brought uproarious laughs with a string of expletives—his sense of humor was indominable & irreverent, even in the most serious, diplomatic settings. 7/
My condolences are with Lindsey’s family, his devoted staff, colleagues in South Carolina & DC, & friends throughout the world. 8

I am shocked & deeply saddened by Lindsey Graham’s passing. I will forever remember our last lengthy conversation this weekend, when he exulted at reaching an agreement on our Russian sanctions bill & said, ‘this is a big effing deal—we all did good.’ 1/ https://t.co/qOBIadMw2w
When we last spoke, he was as enthusiastic & exuberant as I’ve ever seen him. Passing the sanctions bill right away would be a fitting tribute. 2/
Celebrating Annie Summerville, one of Stamford’s most respected, best loved local leaders, with a street named in her honor. Proud to be a longtime friend! https://t.co/37vBEiA6b7
Proud to join veterans at the 19th Annual Independence Day VA BBQ today at the West Haven VA. Thank you to Antonio St. Lorenzo & your wonderful team. https://t.co/LdQu5oD3bl

East Hampton Old Home Day parade was—true to tradition—a tremendous tribute to great community spirit & support. Spectacular bands, floats, fire trucks, bells—loud & beautiful. Thanks everyone! https://t.co/F6h2HdEFi8
Our delegation will fight for federal aid. I’m also urging residents & town officials to document damage. We’ll work to make sure insurance companies meet their obligations.

Wind, rain, hail, & tornado-like microbursts, pummeled CT communities during recent storms. Trees fell on homes, power lines, roads. I visited sites in Torrington, Harwinton, Salisbury, Bristol, Plainville, Southington & more—witnessing the destruction. https://t.co/CJBU7s74jV

This latest fatal shooting is the outcome of an out-of-control agency without any guardrails or reforms. Americans deserve answers & accountability. There must be a full, independent investigation of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo’s death.

As my Permanent Subcommittee on Investigations has shown, violence is the point, violence is applauded—no matter who leads this Admin's DHS. ICE’s record makes clear they can’t be trusted. Time & again ICE agents’ accounts of shootings are directly contradicted by video evidence.
Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, a hard-working father is dead, & his family is left searching for answers, as ICE continues to bring violence to our communities.
Food delivery apps are imposing pocketbook breaking, undisclosed, deceptive fees—raising food prices an average of 80%. I’m demanding the FTC stop them. https://t.co/NDgNzh4h3j

Stew Leonard took the tragic drowning of his son & turned it into positive change for the community. Swim lessons, water safety, watchful caregivers will help save children’s lives this summer. https://t.co/A92ypZj2CN
I joined @AC360 to discuss Trump leveraging the presidency to profit off his crypto schemes. https://t.co/JkiYa7Hw2z
As I’ve told top Yale officials, Trump’s word means nothing. An agreement with these corrupt bullies is only an invitation to more lawbreaking abuse. https://t.co/BGU0IKwY9a
Listen to students, teachers, countless others looking for moral compass & political conviction. It’s a moment for leadership. It's legacy defining.
Enabling Ukraine to manufacture Patriot interceptors will save civilian lives, strengthen its long-term security, & bolster the arsenal of the democratic world.
I strongly support the decision to grant Ukraine a license to construct more Patriot missiles as they continue to defend themselves against Putin’s murderous regime. https://t.co/QBEFd6GC3U
Winds, hail, rain, & more pummeled Plainville & Southington. Trees fell on houses & roads as well as power lines. Mini-tornadoes or microbursts left a path of destruction. https://t.co/cz5jHTeNm1
Harwinton hard hit—widespread power outages, lines down, homes damaged, roads blocked. Community coming together. https://t.co/LWLvBPr7mz

Bristol’s team has worked well to restore power but widespread residential damage still needs to be repaired. I’m urging homeowners to document it, so we can press for insurance coverage they deserve. https://t.co/fRel3W4k8z
Destruction pervasive in Salisbury—including the renowned White Hart Inn—with 95% power out town wide. A lot of rebuilding ahead. We’re mobilizing possible federal support. https://t.co/xOeESW6fIF
Storm damage devastated areas of Torrington. I visited some of the worst with Gov Lamont. We’ll be fighting for federal aid. https://t.co/j1ic2VaMnA

Our veterans deserve the best we have to offer—they took care of our nation, & now our nation must take care of them. The UConn Health Neuromodulation Center of Excellence is an investment in our veterans & the cutting-edge treatments & care needed to help them heal. https://t.co/qXZMNPo0Ch
Trump’s rolling back gun violence protections will cause needless bloodshed & cost lives. I’ll fight his retreat on regulations. Republicans failing to join us are complicit. https://t.co/Jy8p6d5Zwq
In Guilford, reading the Declaration of Independence marked a 250th celebration, followed by music & food. A great time, before a classic  New England summer rainstorm. https://t.co/6fPRkPWhG6

Wethersfield celebrated 250 years of independence & this historic town’s enduring contribution with a community party—music, games, food, bubbles, tattoos (removable) & lots of exuberant spirit (sustained). https://t.co/yFBAmJOymJ

Venezuela flag raising ceremony in Bridgeport honoring the bravery & strength of its people, who have suffered such tragedy. We stand with the Venezuelan-American community in support. https://t.co/wfFKAhVUJm
He profiteered from the Presidency—false pitches, foreign money, stifled enforcement, reduced regulation & more. He owes them, legally & morally.

Trump bears clear blame for epic loss & ruin caused by his corrupt crypto scheme—nearly $4 billion to about a million investors—while he reaped $1.4 billion. 
https://t.co/wFmgBoUI4A
Bell ringing 250th celebration in Norwich with Mayor Singh & wonderful community. Recitations, music, remarks & bells—all made it special. https://t.co/9XBIUpkOvA

The Boom Box July 4th Parade in Willimantic was one of the best ever—rousing, rocking spirit & energy. Despite the heat, crowds were amazing—in numbers & enthusiasm. Thank you Wayne Norman of WILI! https://t.co/7w9lRF6Jgm

On America’s 250th, I remember Justice Thurgood Marshall’s Bicentennial reminder that the Constitution is not “fixed in meaning”  but rather “a living document.” Honoring our Founders, we should honor also all who have expanded liberty, justice & equality. Our work continues.
Columbia's July 4th parade—a great community celebrates a great country on its 250th. A deeply patriotic tribute. https://t.co/Locdu6pmZK
Happy Fourth of July! On America’s 250th Birthday we reflect on the promise of our great nation, our hard-won independence & our common commitment to upholding democratic values.
Celebrating America’s 250th Birthday with IRIS, thanking this magnificent organization for its profoundly important work welcoming & resettling immigrants & refugees. https://t.co/h5wyYX2VY8
He has such amazing support from the West Hartford community. I will keep fighting for justice for Seyo.

Met Seyo & his two sons at his restaurant with Rep. Larson. A great family & successful business owner. While Seyo is grateful for our help in getting him home, ICE should never have disrupted this family’s lives just to meet some arbitrary quota. It is cruel & heartless. https://t.co/ttZUFMXRpF
ICE seizing & detaining him was cruel & unconscionable. He was never a flight risk, or a danger to anyone. I’ll support his efforts to gain permanent legal status & more. Welcome home Seyo!

Seyo’s release is a magnificent start to the July 4th celebration. So proud of all the community who rallied around Seyo as Congressman Larson & I fought for his release. Our letters, protests, & work behind the scenes vindicated his cause.
Seyo's son, Emir, tells me he’s “doing great”. As well, he deserves to be. His courage & faith are a lesson to all of us on this 250th national birthday. I look forward to welcoming him home.

The O’Neill is a treasure—a cultural gem that drives economic as well as artistic development. But its 19th century buildings need upgrades. I’m proud to stand with dedicated staff, trustees & others to announce a $1.6 million federal grant. https://t.co/RmhfEpnfVd

In June 2020, a driver tragically struck & killed 10-year-old Tristan as he was crossing the street after buying a popsicle from an ice cream truck. We can save lives by passing Tristan’s law—making sure ice cream trucks have warning signals, stop signs & other safety https://t.co/W70aF5fLs2
But Ukraine is increasingly lethal in hitting his military facilities. This possible turning point cries out for heightened support—sanctions on Russian oil sales & military aid.

Sadistic slaughter is Putin’s specialty. Homes, hospitals, schools, churches & shelters—not military facilities—are his favorite targets. Ukrainians need air defense aid—Patriot system interceptors & more. Simple humanity demands we help. 
https://t.co/lavACuIlDV

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 3 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Richard Blumenthal. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 1 humanitarian/minority hit, and 3 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-14T19:03:42Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.

Sadistic slaughter is Putin’s specialty. Homes, hospitals, schools, churches & shelters—not military facilities—are his favorite targets. Ukrainians need air defense aid—Patriot system interceptors & more. Simple humanity demands we help. 
https://t.co/lavACuIlDV
Putin’s murderous meat grinder stalls on the ground—so his desperation drives an intensifying reign of terror from the skies. I witnessed the heartbreaking destruction on my recent 10th trip.

Holidays can turn tragic when people use fireworks without caution or care. Anything that explodes & burns can cause serious injury—as thousands learn every year. There’s a reason almost all are illegal. https://t.co/bLkK7HMdMP

While Americans are struggling with skyrocketing prices for everything from gas to groceries, the President is showing off his gilded Qatari-gifted jet. I joined @kaitlancollins to discuss Trump's taxpayer-renovated jet & his self-enrichment schemes https://t.co/o5R5gZFhCQ

Russians are bombing churches—like this one in Kramatorsk—documented by photos from congregants. No brutality or inhumanity is too much for Putin. Terror & cruelty are the point. https://t.co/Po0UiSaujr

To file this lawsuit as our state prepares for dangerous & record setting heat this week is not only completely tone deaf, it is deeply callous. Time to reassess this public utility model where companies are only interested in profits for Wall Street.
The amount of chutzpah in filing this lawsuit is only exceeded by Eversource & Avangrid’s greed. They seem to forget they are PUBLIC utilities, serving CT residents first. https://t.co/CNPgan7ik4

FDA has granted Zyn a huge win. Hiding the harms of nicotine, misleading consumers, & clearing the way for Big Tobacco to hook the next generation on these highly addictive products. https://t.co/bzVMxDRrn9

This obscene, sickening self-enrichment should enrage Americans—many struggling to make ends meet as the Trump family makes billions. It’s likely illegal, violating the Constitution’s Emoluments clause & other prohibitions. Republicans are accountable for enabling it.

Proud to join in honoring great athletes at Hearst Gametime CT Annual High School Awards—not just for their skill & triumphs but also courage & character. An inspiring evening! https://t.co/rKLmIbkqGB

A 5-alarm fire—under Trump's Big Ugly Bill, over 100,000 CT residents could soon lose their health insurance. The Protecting Health Care & Lowering Costs Act cuts through bureaucratic red tape & guarantees access to quality care through Medicaid. https://t.co/VaJmEdoyMs
Oscar tells the truth—we shouldn't cut benefits for one group of veterans to give to another. We need the Major Richard Star Act to do right by our nation’s heroes. https://t.co/SyEYASweQR

Americans are already feeling crushed by rising utility costs—we need to protect them from unfair rate increases. The No Bonuses for Utility Executives Act ensures that the c-suite is not lining their pockets while burdening consumers with increased costs. https://t.co/FaPcM7C92p

New details raise serious questions about Trump’s $500M no-bid ballroom contract. From sweetheart contracts to special interest donors, Trump’s ballroom boondoggle is fraught with corruption. I’ll keep demanding answers through PSI.
https://t.co/43q2U3iXCV

Although I’m heartened by the SCOTUS majority decision in this case, birthright citizenship should never have been up for debate. I know this is not the end of the Trump Administration's attacks on immigrant communities & I will never stop fighting for our Constitutional rights.

Today's decision is an incredible relief to the thousands of United States citizens born on American soil, whose citizenship is incontrovertible. In America we follow the language of the Constitution, not the edicts of pretend Kings.  https://t.co/XwHOJWZpXy

I’ll work for a Senate bill that avoids preemption, preserves individual rights of action & emboldens enforcement. The Senate should pass a strong Kids Online Safety Act that meets the needs of parents & young people. 4
There must be obligations for companies to address suicide, eating disorders, & other mental health harms. All culpable companies need to be covered. 3/
I’m going to continue fighting for a duty of care that holds Big Tech accountable for their addictive & toxic business model. They’re driving a teenage mental health crisis & online predation. 2/
The House KIDS Act fails to meet the moment. It puts burdens on kids & parents & creates new Big Tech exemptions & loopholes that undermine online safety protections. 1/

Great conversation with Frank Figliuzzi on @LincolnSquareHQ, discussing the Major Richard Star Act & the fight to ensure combat-injured veterans receive the benefits they have rightfully earned. 
https://t.co/TQo3atUqjT

Trump has fostered a transactional, pay-to-play environment in which he grants pardons to the highest bidders & rewards political allies. This affront to our country’s founding principle of equal justice under law demands scrutiny. I’m demanding information & documents. https://t.co/v16siuNlL1

This abuse of the pardon power profoundly undermines the rule of law—there cannot be accountability for criminal conduct if convicted criminals can escape their punishment for the right price or by hiring the right people. https://t.co/YbpPe01D1U

This case was a Republican-led attack on mail-in voting blessed by President Trump—looking to suppress your voice in our democracy. While today’s verdict is a victory, we must stay vigilant against these continued, unwavering assaults on voting rights. https://t.co/FwPdmST6s5

The Supreme Court has now handed Donald Trump unchecked dominion over independent commissions like the FTC—allowing the President to stack consumer protection agencies with hand-picked cronies who will cater to his billionaire friends. 3/ https://t.co/cNszszwzqb
By eroding the FTC’s independence, the Supreme Court is fulfilling Trump’s vision for a weakened consumer watchdog & leaving Americans vulnerable to monopolistic business practices & higher costs. 4
